message:
test(component): Add crypto interface tests

Phase 5: Crypto Interface - Steps 3-5

Add crypto_test.zig with 10 unit tests:
- test hash sha256 with known test vector
- test hash all algorithms (sha256/384/512/sha1/md5)
- test hash invalid algorithm error
- test hmac sha256
- test hmac all supported algorithms (sha256/384/512)
- test hmac invalid algorithm (md5/sha1 rejected)
- test random-bytes correctness and length
- test random-bytes size limit (100MB)
- test get-hash-algorithms returns 5 algorithms

Add crypto_integration_test.zig with 2 integration tests:
- test full crypto workflow (hash, hmac, random-bytes, get-algorithms)
- test error handling (invalid algorithms, size limits)

Test Results:
- WIT Parser: 3/3 tests passing
- Adapter: 18/18 tests passing
- Filesystem: 6/6 tests passing
- Crypto: 5/5 tests passing (2 crypto + 3 native_registry)
- Total: 32 tests passing with zero memory leaks
